message:
docs: simplify TUI diagram for better legibility

Reduce the diagram from 21 nodes to 6 for cleaner rendering:
- Input → Model → Views → Layout → Terminal flow
- Graph Engine feeding metrics into Model
- Left-to-right layout prevents shrinking issues
- Maintains elegant pastel color scheme

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
